overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in dark clothing walking steadily along a snowy mountain trail at night. The character moves through a winter landscape with snow-covered pine trees and rocky outcrops, progressing from a rocky section to a fenced path, and finally approaching a distant figure standing in the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain trail with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy trail through a forested mountain area

entered.detail: snow-packed dirt path winding through the mountains
snow-laden evergreen trees surrounding the path
large boulders and rock formations covered in snow
snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the background under moonlight
wooden posts marking the trail boundary

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snow-covered mountain trail surrounded by pine trees and large rock formations. The night sky is partially visible through the trees, casting a cool blue light over the snowy landscape. Wooden fence posts line the right side of the path in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail with fence posts

events.description: distant human figure becomes visible standing in the path ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail, passing wooden fence posts on the right

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through the snowy forest as the character passes the large rock formations. Wooden fence posts become more prominent on the right side of the path. Towards the end of the segment, a distant figure becomes visible standing in the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrowing mountain trail approaching a figure

events.description: trail inclines upward as character approaches the standing figure

agents.ego_description: walking uphill toward the distant figure standing motionless in the path

notable_agents.action: standing motionless in the path ahead, facing the approaching character

segments.scene_description: The path narrows and inclines upward as the character approaches a figure standing in the trail. The wooden fence posts fall behind, replaced by rocky terrain on the left. The figure becomes increasingly distinct as the character closes the distance, standing motionless in the center of the snowy path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain trail at night that transitions from a forested path into a narrow, rocky ascent toward a mysterious figure. It begins with the character walking past large rock formations and pine trees under a cool blue night sky, with wooden fence posts appearing in the distance. As the character progresses, the forest thins and the fence posts become more prominent along the right side of the path before a distant figure emerges in the trail ahead. The scene then shifts as the path narrows and inclines upward, leaving the fence posts behind in favor of rocky terrain on the left. Finally, the camera closes the distance as the motionless figure becomes increasingly distinct in the center of the snowy path.
